ddls:
CREATE TABLE "music_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music track */,
  "ornamentation" INTEGER /* Level of ornamentation in the track */,
  "grooviness" INTEGER /* Level of grooviness in the track */,
  "familiarity" INTEGER /* Level of familiarity of the track */,
  "liking" INTEGER /* User's liking of the track */,
  "consonance" INTEGER /* Level of consonance in the track */,
  "valence" INTEGER /* Valence of the track (positive or negative emotion) */,
  "excitement" INTEGER /* Excitement level of the track */,
  "sound_quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the sound in the track */,
  "tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the track */,
  "rhythmic_regularity" INTEGER /* Rhythmic regularity of the track */,
  "vocal_range" INTEGER /* Range of the vocal in the track */,
  "vocal_tension" INTEGER /* Tension in the vocal of the track */,
  "vocal_texture" INTEGER /* Texture of the vocal in the track */,
  "instrument_vocal_overlap" INTEGER /* Overlap between instruments and vocals in the track */,
  "instrument_overlap" INTEGER /* Overlap between different instruments in the track */,
  "instrument_tone_blend" INTEGER /* Blend of tones between instruments in the track */,
  "instrument_rhythm_blend" INTEGER /* Blend of rhythms between instruments in the track */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the track has been edited */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist or band name of the track */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album name of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was released */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the lyrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music track being rated */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "liking" INTEGER /* User's liking of the track */,
  "consonance" INTEGER /* Level of consonance in the track */,
  "valence" INTEGER /* Valence of the track (positive or negative emotion) */,
  "excitement" INTEGER /* Excitement level of the track */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used for rating */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the rating was given */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context about the rating */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES music_tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, music producer) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Preferred music genres */,
  "preferred_artists" TEXT /* Preferred artists */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music track */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the track */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the track has been edited in this version */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the track version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_versions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES music_tracks ("track_id")
)
